docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF LUCIA SANCHEZ (TRANSACTION ID # 66352898) FILED BY PETITIONER W-2500 MARINER, LLC
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-11-2021 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, ARGUMENT/DISCUSSIONS ARE HELD. THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER W-2500 MARINER, LLC'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS BY AND BETWEEN JOHN ADAMS JR AND W-2500 MARINER, LLC, PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA INSURANCE CODE 1034, ET SEQ. IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO JUNE 10, 2021 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 302 TO ALLOW TIME FOR MR. ADAMS TO RETAIN INDEPENDENT ADVICE AND REPRESENTATION. THE COURT ORDERED MR. GILL TO PROVIDE NOTICE TO MR. ADAMS OF THE JUNE 10, 2021 HEARING DATE. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM. (302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
Off Calendar Jun-10-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court rules as follows:

PETITIONER W-2500 MARINER, LLC's Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between John Adams Jr And W-2500 Mariner, LLC, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 1034, Et Seq. is off calendar.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between John Adams Jr And W-2500 Mariner, Llc, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 1034, Et Seq. & Payment Of Court Reporter Fee
Off Calendar Mar-11-2021 Continued To Jun-10-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Atty. Sanpreet Gil, Esq. of , 818.521.1287, appearing for the Petitioner W-2500 Mariner LLC;
John Adams, Respondent appearing in propria persona.

The matter is called and passed for an appearance by John Adams.

At the second call of the matter, Mr. Adams is present on a ZOOM conference call with Mr. Sanpreet.

Argument/discussions are held. At the conclusion of argument/discussions, the Court rules as follows: PETITIONER W-2500 MARINER, LLC's Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between John Adams Jr And W-2500 Mariner, LLC, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 1034, Et Seq. is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.

Brief discussions are held. The Court questions Mr. Adams about continuing the matter to allow time for him to seek advice/representation. Mr. Adams requests the Court continue the matter 90-120 days.

The Court continued the matter to June 10, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 302 to allow time for Mr. Adams to retain independent advice and representation.

At the final moments of today's hearing Mr. Adams was dropped from the call. The Court ordered Mr. Gill to provide notice to Mr. Adams of the June 10, 2021 hearing date.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/EPS)
